name: gate-registered-resolves-accept
description: The positive baseline. The contract references a hook export (`useLeafletMap` from `@ggui-samples/leaflet`) and a package that exposes both a component and a hook export (`RevenueChart` + `useChartTheme` from `@ggui-samples/charts`). Every `(package, export)` pair the contract names resolves to a registered export by identity. The gate MUST accept — no reject, regardless of export kind.
